title: ruta daurica
intro: Ruta daurica, also known as the golden seal or Daurian rue, is a perennial plant belonging to the Rutaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ruta daurica include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and pain. Ruta daurica can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
